widget.open: Report a bug or send feedback
widget.title: Report a bug or send feedback
widget.description: Help us improve Asha. Your report goes straight to the team's triage board.
widget.bugPlaceholder: Describe the problem and the steps to reproduce it…
widget.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell us what you think or what you'd like to see…
widget.pasteHint: Tip: you can also paste an image (⌘/Ctrl+V).
widget.imageTooLarge: That image is too large — try a smaller screenshot.
widget.sentHint: The team can follow up on the triage board.
widget.failed: Couldn't send your report. Please try again.

triage.title: Feedback & bug reports
triage.description: The shared triage memory — users, admins and automated agents collaborate on what to fix and what's fixed.
triage.memoryNote: This is the shared memory: every report keeps a collaboration thread, so people and automated agents work the same record — noting what to fix, and confirming what's fixed.
triage.emptyDescription: Reports and feedback filed from the in-app widget show up here.
triage.notePlaceholder: Add a note to the thread…

delete.confirmBody: This feedback will be permanently deleted.
